name: Fen Caldra
excerpt: A careful and discreet private transport operator in Tiveck.
notes: Fen Caldra is in his mid-40s, born and raised in Tiveck, and operates a private transport service with a reputation for reliability and discretion. He runs cargo through the Salt Warren, a network of tidal caves beneath Tiveck, and maintains relationships to use it for gray-market storage. He discovered the Sunken Ledger six years ago and has kept it hidden. Fen has leverage over Orris Vane using the Warden's Seal, a forged document, and has a complex relationship with Maren Ashveil, who he suspects is looking for the Ledger.
